query:
SELECT
                l.id AS "link_id!"
            FROM
                public.email_links l
            JOIN
                public.email_user_history h ON l.id = h.link_id
            WHERE
                l.macro_id NOT LIKE '%@macro.com'
            GROUP BY
                l.id
            HAVING
                MAX(h.updated_at) < NOW() - (make_interval(days => $1))
